subcodes.first_line: The Day hath indeed come, and that which lay hidden behind the pavilions of grandeur and was inscribed in the Books of God, the Lord of all worlds, hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الیوم و ظهر ما کان مستورا خلف سرادق العظمة و مسطورا فی کتب الله رب العالمین
